_comment: Example user theme. Copy into <data>/themes/<name>.json (data dir: $AGENTCHAT_DATA or ~/.agentchat). 'base' picks the built-in to extend (agentchat-dark or agentchat-light); 'vars' overrides its colors. A file named after a built-in (e.g. agentchat-dark.json) overrides that theme in place. Values must be CSS colors: hex, rgb[a](), hsl[a](), or a color name.
name: sepia
